prompt: Create a vertical cinematic portrait photograph in a dreamy Japanese festival installation, 2:3 aspect ratio. Show a young woman in side profile facing left, her face deliberately hidden by a soft square blur/mosaic censor block centered over the face. She has very long flowing bright turquoise blue hair cascading down her back in loose waves, with glossy strands catching warm light. She wears a dark navy embroidered kimono-style robe with delicate floral embroidery, metallic thread, red tassel accents, and a narrow belt. Her left hand is raised gracefully near her cheek, fingers elegant and softly lit. Surround her with exactly 10 visible hanging round or oval floral paper ornaments decorated with red blossoms and blue leaves: one large sharp ornament near her raised hand, one partial ornament at the upper left edge, one softly blurred ornament near the top center, one partial ornament at mid-left, one small orange-centered ornament on the left, one large blurred ornament in the lower-left foreground, one oval ornament near the upper right, one small blurred ornament at mid-right, one partial ornament at lower right, and one distant blurred ornament in the background. Add exactly 8 translucent curling gold ribbon streamers hanging vertically through the scene, some sharp near the subject and some heavily blurred in the foreground. Use shallow depth of field, warm amber highlights mixed with cool teal shadows, bokeh, soft backlighting, rich contrast, and a magical atmospheric mood. Keep the composition intimate and vertical, with the woman slightly right of center, ornaments framing her on all sides, foreground elements blurred for depth, no text, no watermark.
